item.title: Sentinel Vision and Zebra Technologies Launch AI, 3D Automated Inspection System
item.description: Sentinel Vision and Zebra Technologies have developed an AI-driven 3D inspection system that improves automotive door assembly quality by replacing manual checks with automated, scalable solutions, reducing errors and increasing efficiency.

item.title: Redefining In-Line Inspection for High-Volume Manufacturing
item.description: Traditional quality control methods are becoming outdated due to inefficiencies, reliance on manual labor, subjective assessments, tooling obstructions, and human error. In additive manufacturing, the challenges of complex geometries, tight tolerances, and scalability demands make quality control even more difficult. AM-Flow aims to solve this with fully automated, lights-out production powered by cutting-edge technology.

item.title: Robot-Assisted 3D Laser Scanning Redefines Inline Quality Inspection
item.description: AT Sensors, in collaboration with LASS Technology and EVT Eye Vision Technology, has enabled fully automated, 100% inline inspection of industrial components - delivering stable, operator-independent measurement results directly on the production line.

item.title: Direct Scanning Laser Trackers – A New Era for Quality Control
item.description: Precision drives the success of every modern manufacturing line with mounting pressure to deliver flawless components while managing limited factory space and a shortage of skilled operators.

item.title: Next‑Gen Vision and OCR for Supply Chain Operations
item.description: AmbiVision by Ambi Robotics leverages AI and cognitive OCR to automate item identification, tracking, and inspection in logistics environments, even when labels are damaged or missing, boosting accuracy and efficiency.

item.title: Is Smartphone-Based Visual Inspection the Future of Quality Control?
item.description: The piece discusses the rapid advancements in smartphone camera technology and edge AI processing, predicting a future where accessible, democratized visual inspection tools enable any factory worker to perform quality checks, driving industry-wide improvements.

item.title: Visions Podcast: From Legacy to Lightning
item.description: This episode explores integrating AI into legacy inspection systems, highlighting Elementary's approach to augmenting cameras with AI classification to improve manufacturing quality...
